name: g_mmpbsa
description: Calculate MM-PBSA binding free energies from GROMACS trajectories. Perform per-residue energy decomposition of protein-protein and protein–ligand interactions.
capabilities: Calculate MM-PBSA binding free energies from GROMACS trajectories
Perform per-residue energy decomposition of protein-protein and protein–ligand interactions

trajectory_file.description: GROMACS trajectory file (XTC format) from a molecular dynamics simulation

topology_file.description: GROMACS topology file (TPR format) for the simulation system

index_file.description: GROMACS index file (NDX format) defining custom atom groups for energy decomposition

decomposition.description: Enable per-residue energy decomposition of binding interactions
